sourcePdfTitle: The Liturgy of the Ethiopian Church
sourcePdfEdition: Translated by Rev. Marcos Daoud; revised by H. E. Blatta Marsie Hazen; re-edited March 22, 2006 PDF edition
extractionStatus: initial full-PDF structured extraction with manual rule review notes

sectionsCompleted.notes: Preparatory/opening, readings, general anaphora framing, and Communion framework extracted into sectional paragraph arrays.
Fourteen anaphoras extracted by PDF contents page ranges with fullText paragraph arrays.
Standard five-reading pattern extracted from the introduction.
Explicit occasion notes and partial rules extracted from anaphora headings/footnotes.
Communion explanation and repeated Communion paragraphs extracted.

sectionsNeedingManualReview: Exact daily getsawe readings are not supplied as a complete table in this PDF extraction.
Some PDF occasion notes are broad or conditional and must be mapped to calendar data by a human reviewer.
PDF text extraction may introduce line breaks, OCR-like spacing, or heading duplication; review before publishing long text in the UI.
The dismissal/going-out material on the final PDF page appears truncated by the PDF ending and should be checked against another edition.
dataDesignNotes: Long liturgical text is stored as paragraph arrays to support mobile accordions, tabs, cards, and sectional readers.
sourcePageStart and sourcePageEnd use the visible PDF page numbers.
No rules or liturgical wording were added unless supported by the PDF text or marked as TODO/manual review.
